lines.speaker: Santiri
lines.text: Welcome, human, to the Quality Weapons Shop! Can I interest you in a purchase?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I'm looking for some weapons.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Santiri
lines.text: Good day to you, human. I have a little task for you, are you interested?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's the task?

lines.speaker: Santiri
lines.text: Oh, it's nothing too major. But I need [3/4/5] [item] in the next [15/20/25] minutes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure, got it. That's [3/4/5] [item] in the next [15/20/25] minutes, I'll get right on it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I'm a little busy.

lines.speaker: Santiri
lines.text: No problem, I'll find someone else to do it!

sections.title: Getting a bar or ore item request

lines.speaker: Santiri
lines.text: Good day to you, human. I have a little task for you, are you interested?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's the task?

lines.speaker: Santiri
lines.text: Well, I'm running a bit low on raw supplies. Can you get me [X] [item]? Within [X] minutes?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure, got it. That's [X] [item] in the next [X] minutes, I'll get right on it.

sections.title: Talking to him before acquiring the item request

lines.speaker: Santiri
lines.text: Did you get me 5 iron pickaxes yet, perchance?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I've given up on that.

lines.speaker: Santiri
lines.text: That's very unfortunate to hear. I suppose I will need to find someone else now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I'm still looking for them.

lines.speaker: Santiri
lines.text: Keep it up, I'm sure you'll succeed.

sections.title: Talking to him after failing to bring the request in time

lines.speaker: Santiri
lines.text: You're too late, I'm afraid, the [X] minutes are up. I got someone else to get me [X] [item].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah, uhm, sorry about that...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Look, I've got you your [X] [item]!

lines.speaker: Santiri
lines.text: That's wonderful, thanks a lot [player name]!

lines.speaker: Santiri
lines.text: Do you want me to pay you in gold or do you wish me teach you how to attack with these?

lines.speaker: Santiri
lines.text: Do you want me to pay you in gold or would you prefer me to teach you a bit about how you can mine more efficiently?

lines.speaker: Santiri
lines.text: Do you want me to pay you in gold or would you like me to show you some smithing tricks?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like the gold.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Please teach me that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Show me the gold!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Enlighten me.
